About the FSCE test

Four papers.
One test day.

The FSCE entrance test is made up of four named papers, each testing a different skill across the full KS2 curriculum — not just Maths and English.

🗺️

Adventure Paper

Multiple choice questions across all KS2 subjects

Explore →
✏️

Beacon Paper

Short written answers across all KS2 subjects

Explore →
🧭

Compass Paper

Multiple choice questions across all KS2 subjects

Explore →
💡

Discovery Paper

Creative response — imaginative and continuous writing

Explore →

Subjects covered across all papers: Art & Design · Computing · Design & Technology · English · Geography · History · Languages · Maths · Music · PE · Science

Additional Services

🎯

Curated Mini Practice Paper — On Demand

Need to focus on a specific topic? We'll build a tailored mini paper around your child's exact needs. You choose any two topics and one difficulty level — we do the rest. Each mini paper includes 60 practice questions in total, with 30 questions for each chosen topic.

60 practice questions 30 questions per topic Choose any 2 topics 1 difficulty level per order Delivered as personalised PDF

£25

fixed price per paper

Order & Pay →

Creative & Continuous Writing Assessment

Email your child's creative or continuous writing and receive a scored, detailed assessment within 24 hours. Our assessment approach is informed by publicly available FSCE familiarisation material and CSSE guidance. WhatsApp submission is coming soon. Pay for 4 weeks upfront, no ongoing commitment.

✍️

The process

Purchase to practice
in under a minute.

Step 01

🛒

Choose your paper

Browse by subject or difficulty. Buy a single paper or build a revision set — no account required.

Step 02

💳

Pay securely

Payment is handled through a secure, industry-standard payment gateway. Card details never touch our servers, and a receipt is issued automatically.

Step 03

⬇️

Download instantly

Your password-protected PDF is ready the moment payment clears. Open it with the email address used at checkout — yours to print or use digitally.

Ready to start preparing?

Join hundreds of Essex families building confidence before the big day.
